category.description: Category name matching feeds.yaml (e.g. news, manufacturing, comedy)

text.description: Draft post body. Emoji tag will be prepended if tag_emoji is set.

tag_emoji.description: Optional emoji prefix (e.g. 👽). Resolved from data/tags.json if omitted.

source_url.description: Optional URL. Including https:// in final text increases X API post cost.

metadata.description: Optional agent metadata (agent name, prompt version, etc.)
